assumptions: Assume the dividend has been declared and recorded as an intragroup receivable/payable that is a recognised monetary item.
Assume the question is limited to hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9 for the foreign-exchange risk component of that item.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies fair value hedge accounting for a recognised asset or liability and separately states that foreign currency risk on an intragroup monetary item may qualify as a hedged item in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies cash flow hedge accounting as a separate hedge model and also addresses qualifying foreign-currency intragroup transactions in consolidated financial statements.
